overview: FoodRush is a full-stack food delivery platform inspired by Swiggy and Zomato. It lets customers browse restaurants, search and filter food items, add to cart, pay with Stripe, and track orders in real time. Admins can manage restaurants, menus, orders, and users from a dedicated dashboard.
features: Internet Identity login with customer and admin roles
Browse restaurants with images, ratings, and cuisine types
Search and filter food by category, price, and rating
Shopping cart with quantity controls and order summary
Stripe payment integration with order confirmation
Order tracking: pending, preparing, out for delivery, delivered
Customer order history with expandable order details
Ratings and reviews after order delivery
Admin dashboard: manage restaurants, menus, orders, and users
Responsive mobile-first UI with Swiggy/Zomato design language
